base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of black_white_magic_vfx — a effect_layer (spell_vfx) from 1991 final fantasy iv. All spell VFX — Black (Fire/Blizzard/Thunder/Meteor/Quake/etc.) + White (Cure/Raise/Haste/Slow/Holy) + special moves. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: All spell VFX — Black (Fire/Blizzard/Thunder/Meteor/Quake/etc.) + White (Cure/Raise/Haste/Slow/Holy) + special moves
